series_metadata.series_description: Comments submitted to the electronic system of record by interested members of the public, ODM, and ODJFs county staff in response to draft rules and other draft documents posted to the clearance electronic system of record. Responses by ODM staff to comments submitted to the electronic system of record by interested members of the public, ODM, and ODJFS county staff, in response to draft rules and other draft documents posted to the clearance electronic system of record.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 5 years or until the database is superseded by a new electronic system and then destroy., Electronic: Erase
